name: American Atheists National Convention
description: Annual convention with speakers, workshops, and networking for the secular community.

name: National Day of Reason
description: A secular alternative to the National Day of Prayer — celebrating reason, science, and secular values.

name: Reason Rally
description: The largest secular gathering in the world — advocacy, community, and celebration on the National Mall.

name: Secular Student Alliance Annual Conference
description: Training, networking, and community for secular student leaders from across the country.

name: The Amazing Meeting (TAM)
description: Premier skepticism and critical thinking conference hosted by the James Randi Educational Foundation.

name: Atheist Alliance International Convention
description: International gathering of atheist and secular organizations from around the world.

name: Sunday Assembly Global Meetup
description: Monthly virtual gathering of the secular congregation — talks, music, and community.

name: Secular Social Justice Conference
description: Exploring the intersection of secular values and social justice advocacy.

name: Banned Books Week
description: Annual celebration of the freedom to read — events at libraries and bookstores nationwide.

name: CSICon (Committee for Skeptical Inquiry Conference)
description: Critical thinking and scientific skepticism conference hosted by the Center for Inquiry.

name: FFRF National Convention
description: Annual convention of the Freedom From Religion Foundation — speakers, legal updates, awards.

name: International Blasphemy Day
description: Annual observance defending the right to criticize and satirize religion without fear of reprisal.

name: Darwin Day
description: Celebrating science and reason on the anniversary of Charles Darwin's birth.

name: Recovering from Religion Online Support Group
description: Free peer support group for people leaving religion — meets weekly online.

name: Humanist Heritage Walking Tour
description: Guided walking tour of sites connected to humanist and freethought history in London.

name: Center for Inquiry Skeptic Book Club
description: Monthly book discussion focusing on skepticism, science, and secular thought.

name: Camp Quest Summer Camp
description: Residential summer camp for children of freethinking families — science, critical thinking, and outdoor fun.

name: Freethought Day
description: Annual celebration commemorating the end of the Salem witch trials — speakers, music, and community.

name: Solstice Celebration
description: Secular winter solstice celebrations — a science-based alternative to religious holidays.

name: World Humanist Day
description: Annual global celebration of humanism on the June solstice — events, lectures, and community gatherings.
